title: Full Body Korean Luxury Studio Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Full Body Korean Luxury Studio Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Full-body 1:1 professional fashion editorial portrait of adult Korean woman standing confidently in a luxury studio in a luxury studio. Subject: adult Korean woman standing confidently in a luxury studio wears tailored cream high-waist trousers, ivory silk blouse, and minimal luxury accessories and holds elegant high-fashion stance with one leg slightly forward, weight on one hip, shoulders relaxed, chin lifted, one hand in trouser pocket, and direct eye contact, with confident but approachable expression and refined fashion model posture. Scene: clean luxury studio with polished editorial backdrop stays clean and premium, supporting luxury brand ambassador energy and head-to-toe outfit readability. Composition: Fixed perfectly balanced 1:1 full-body composition, body angled about 30 degrees or standing tall, face turned toward lens, natural S-curve or crossed-ankle posture, and full outfit visible. Signature Elements: Preserved full body korean luxury studio fashion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Professional supermodel body language, Vogue editorial styling, luxury fashion campaign, refined feminine elegance, natural posture, premium studio photography, and magazine-cover polish. Color Palette: Fixed luxury studio neutrals with wardrobe-led accents, polished skin tones, and restrained editorial contrast. Lighting: Soft premium studio lighting with crisp full-body detail, clean face readability, refined fabric highlights, and gentle floor shadows. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
